description_long: This is a modern, three-seat sofa upholstered in a textured blue fabric, featuring a minimalist and boxy silhouette. The sofa has three large, loose back cushions and three seat cushions, all uniform in size, with two accent pillows—one brown and one beige—placed at opposite ends. The armrests are straight, high, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a clean-lined, geometric profile. The legs are slim, metallic, and positioned at the corners, giving the sofa a slightly elevated and airy appearance. The upholstery appears to be a solid blue weave, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting. The overall design is contemporary and functional, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern outdoor patios.
description: A contemporary blue three-seat sofa with straight armrests, loose cushions, and slim metallic legs, accented by two contrasting pillows. The design is minimalist and boxy, with a solid blue fabric upholstery.
description_view_0: Front view showing three blue seat and back cushions, two accent pillows (brown and beige), and the straight, high armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sofa's slim metallic legs, the thickness of the armrest, and the brown accent pillow.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous blue fabric back and the uniform height of the backrest and armrests.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the beige accent pillow, the straight armrest, and the sofa's overall depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three loose, uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, with two smaller accent pillows at each end; all cushions are individual and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, high armrests at the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, track profile and no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four slim, straight metallic legs positioned at the corners, slightly inset from the edges, with a minimalist and exposed design.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest with three large, loose cushions; the backrest is high and matches the armrest height, with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid blue fabric with a subtle woven texture; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
